Registry / Terms / measurement precision

measurement precision

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #02667 · 2 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 2 distinct definitions — harmonise.
